extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: all “By” rows are excluded; criminal proceedings against the listed entities are Nil except 2 against KMP/SMP, statutory or regulatory proceedings against the Company, subsidiaries, directors, KMP/SMP and promoters are all Nil, and tax proceedings against the Company are 12 with subsidiaries Nil. The quantified aggregate against the Company is ₹1,175.07 million; subsidiaries have no quantified amount, so the group amount is ₹1,175.07 million = ₹117.507 crore, excluding promoter, director, KMP/SMP and “By” matters. Contingent liabilities are disclosed in the September 30, 2025 table in ₹ millions without a stated Total row; summing bank guarantee ₹0.72 million, income-tax dispute ₹592.48 million and GST dispute ₹104.44 million gives ₹697.64 million = ₹69.764 crore. The company-wide top-five and top-ten customer concentration figures are for Financial Year 2025 and are percentages of revenue from operations: 23.65% and 33.74%, respectively; the interim figures are not used because a full fiscal year is available. The source currency unit is ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
